findings.evidence: `rg` shows public `normalizerQuotientMulAction` at lines 214-218 and `private lemma normalizerQuotient_smul_eq_orbitHom` at lines 220-224; only representative lemmas are public at lines 228 and 236.
findings.fix: Make `normalizerQuotient_smul_eq_orbitHom` public, preferably with the normal-form simp annotation if it is intended to rewrite arbitrary `q • x` to `normalizerQuotientOrbitHom H q x`.
findings.issue: `normalizerQuotientMulAction` is public, but the lemma identifying its smul with `normalizerQuotientOrbitHom` is private, leaving the public action under-characterized away from `QuotientGroup.mk` representatives.

summary: The normalizer-quotient action has representative simp lemmas, but its general characteristic lemma is kept private, so users cannot relate the public instance to the public homomorphism for an arbitrary quotient element without unfolding the construction.
